name: Tapenade
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a pestle and mortar, crush the black olives, capers, anchovies (if using), and canned tuna together until smooth.
2. Add the cognac and mix gently.
3. Serve as a spread with bread or toast points.
Nutritional analysis per serving: 142 calories; 15.0 grams fat; 6.13 milligrams cholesterol; 514 milligrams sodium; 81% of calories from fat.
